title: Aging Alternative Minimal Copper Armour
description: This pack adds oxidation to my minimal copper armour pack (which itself is an addon for Hoffen's Minimal Armor pack).
body:
This pack adds oxidation to my [Alternative Minimal Copper Armour](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/hoffens-minimal-armor-copper-addon) pack. Copper armour will naturally oxidise as it loses durability, or you can rename items to force a desired level of oxidation.

Naming scheme:
Oxidised/Weathered/Exposed Copper Helmet/Chestplate/Leggings/Boots.

If this pack shows as broken or incompatible, version 1.1 removes the error :)

This addon was kept seperate from my original because it depends on [Variants-CIT](https://modrinth.com/mod/variants-cit) which can be found here on modrinth.

This pack is an addon for my [Minimal Copper Armour](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/hoffens-minimal-armor-copper-addon) pack (which itself is an addon for [Hoffen's Minimal Armor](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/hoffens-minimal-armor) pack). I **would not recommend** using this pack without **both** Hoffen's original and my base addon.

Also, my thanks to Gowthrr and their [post](https://github.com/Estecka/mc-Variants-CIT/issues/83#issuecomment-3342264985) on GitHub which helped a lot while I was trying to figure out how to get the durability aspect of this pack working.

Any issues, let me know on Discord @hbutmorelikeh.
